CompanyFromIP.ReportDocumentation: Shows which companies and organizations visited your website, resolved from visitor IP addresses via ipinfo.io.
CompanyFromIP.SettingApiTokenDesc: Your ipinfo.io API token. Get a free token at https://ipinfo.io. Without a token, lookups are limited to 1,000 per day.
CompanyFromIP.SettingCacheTtlDesc: Number of days to cache IP lookup results. Longer cache reduces API calls. Minimum 1, maximum 365.
CompanyFromIP.SettingTimeoutDesc: Maximum seconds to wait for ipinfo.io responses. Keep this low to avoid slowing visit tracking. Minimum 1, maximum 30.
CompanyFromIP.SettingEnableDesc: When disabled, no IP lookups are performed and company names are not recorded for new visits.
